2Peter3:18 But grow in the grace and knowledge of our Lord and Savior Jesus Christ. To Him be the glory both now and to the day of eternity. Amen.
1John1:1 That which was from the beginning
1John1:2 And this is the life that was revealed; we have seen it and testified to it
1John1:3 We proclaim to you what we have seen and heard
1John1:4 We write these things so that our joy may be complete.
1John1:5 And this is the message we have heard from Him and announce to you: God is light
1John1:6 If we say we have fellowship with Him yet walk in the darkness
1John1:7 But if we walk in the light as He is in the light
1John1:8 If we say we have no sin
1John1:9 If we confess our sins
1John1:10 If we say we have not sinned
1John2:1 My little children
1John2:2 He Himself is the atoning sacrifice for our sins
1John2:3 By this we can be sure that we have come to know Him: if we keep His commandments.
1John2:4 If anyone says
1John2:5 But if anyone keeps His word
1John2:6 Whoever claims to abide in Him must walk as Jesus walked.
1John2:7 Beloved
1John2:8 Then again
1John2:9 If anyone claims to be in the light but hates his brother
1John2:10 Whoever loves his brother remains in the light
1John2:11 But whoever hates his brother is in the darkness and walks in the darkness. He does not know where he is going
1John2:12 I am writing to you
1John2:13 I am writing to you
1John2:14 I have written to you
1John2:15 Do not love the world or anything in the world. If anyone loves the world
1John2:16 For all that is in the world—the desires of the flesh
1John2:17 The world is passing away
1John2:18 Children
1John2:19 They went out from us
1John2:20 You
1John2:21 I have not written to you because you lack knowledge of the truth
1John2:22 Who is the liar
1John2:23 Whoever denies the Son does not have the Father
1John2:24 As for you
1John2:25 And this is the promise that He Himself made to us: eternal life.
1John2:26 I have written these things to you about those who are trying to deceive you.
1John2:27 And as for you
1John2:28 And now
1John2:29 If you know that He is righteous
1John3:1 Behold what manner of love the Father has given to us
1John3:2 Beloved
1John3:3 And everyone who has this hope in Him purifies himself
1John3:4 Everyone who practices sin practices lawlessness as well. Indeed
1John3:5 But you know that Christ appeared to take away sins
1John3:6 No one who remains in Him keeps on sinning. No one who continues to sin has seen Him or known Him.
1John3:7 Little children
1John3:8 The one who practices sin is of the devil
1John3:9 Anyone born of God refuses to practice sin
1John3:10 By this the children of God are distinguished from the children of the devil: Anyone who does not practice righteousness is not of God
1John3:11 This is the message you have heard from the beginning: We should love one another.
1John3:12 Do not be like Cain
1John3:13 So do not be surprised
1John3:14 We know that we have passed from death to life
1John3:15 Everyone who hates his brother is a murderer
1John3:16 By this we know what love is: Jesus laid down His life for us
1John3:17 If anyone with earthly possessions sees his brother in need
1John3:18 Little children
1John3:19 And by this we will know that we belong to the truth
1John3:20 Even if our hearts condemn us
1John3:21 Beloved
1John3:22 and we will receive from Him whatever we ask
1John3:23 And this is His commandment: that we should believe in the name of His Son
1John3:24 Whoever keeps His commandments remains in God
1John4:1 Beloved
1John4:2 By this you will know the Spirit of God: Every spirit that confesses that Jesus Christ has come in the flesh is from God
1John4:3 and every spirit that does not confess Jesus is not from God. This is the spirit of the antichrist
1John4:4 You
1John4:5 They are of the world. That is why they speak from the world’s perspective
1John4:6 We are from God. Whoever knows God listens to us; whoever is not from God does not listen to us. That is how we know the Spirit of truth and the spirit of deception.
1John4:7 Beloved
1John4:8 Whoever does not love does not know God
1John4:9 This is how God’s love was revealed among us: God sent His one and only Son into the world
1John4:10 And love consists in this: not that we loved God
1John4:11 Beloved
1John4:12 No one has ever seen God; but if we love one another
1John4:13 By this we know that we remain in Him
1John4:14 And we have seen and testify that the Father has sent His Son to be the Savior of the world.
1John4:15 If anyone confesses that Jesus is the Son of God
1John4:16 And we have come to know and believe the love that God has for us. God is love; whoever abides in love abides in God
1John4:17 In this way
1John4:18 There is no fear in love
1John4:19 We love because He first loved us.
1John4:20 If anyone says
1John4:21 And we have this commandment from Him: Whoever loves God must love his brother as well.
1John5:1 Everyone who believes that Jesus is the Christ has been born of God
1John5:2 By this we know that we love the children of God: when we love God and keep His commandments.
1John5:3 For this is the love of God
1John5:4 because everyone born of God overcomes the world. And this is the victory that has overcome the world: our faith.
1John5:5 Who then overcomes the world? Only he who believes that Jesus is the Son of God.
1John5:6 This is the One who came by water and blood
1John5:7 For there are three that testify:
1John5:8 the Spirit
1John5:9 Even if we accept human testimony
1John5:10 Whoever believes in the Son of God has this testimony within him; whoever does not believe God has made Him out to be a liar
1John5:11 And this is that testimony: God has given us eternal life
1John5:12 Whoever has the Son has life; whoever does not have the Son of God does not have life.
1John5:13 I have written these things to you who believe in the name of the Son of God
1John5:14 And this is the confidence that we have before Him: If we ask anything according to His will
1John5:15 And if we know that He hears us in whatever we ask
1John5:16 If anyone sees his brother committing a sin not leading to death
1John5:17 All unrighteousness is sin
1John5:18 We know that anyone born of God does not keep on sinning; the One who was born of God protects him
1John5:19 We know that we are of God
1John5:20 And we know that the Son of God has come and has given us understanding
1John5:21 Little children

2John1:2 because of the truth that abides in us and will be with us forever:

2John1:5 And now I urge you
2John1:6 And this is love
2John1:7 For many deceivers have gone out into the world

2John1:9 Anyone who runs ahead without remaining in the teaching of Christ does not have God. Whoever remains in His teaching has both the Father and the Son.

2John1:11 Whoever greets such a person shares in his evil deeds.

2John1:13 The children of your elect sister send you greetings.

Jude1:2 Mercy
Jude1:3 Beloved

Jude1:5 Although you are fully aware of this
Jude1:6 And the angels who did not stay within their own domain but abandoned their proper dwelling—these He has kept in eternal chains under darkness
Jude1:7 In like manner
Jude1:8 Yet in the same way these dreamers defile their bodies
Jude1:9 But even the archangel Michael
Jude1:10 These men
Jude1:11 Woe to them! They have traveled the path of Cain; they have rushed headlong into the error of Balaam; they have perished in Korah’s rebellion.
Jude1:12 These men are hidden reefs in your love feasts
Jude1:13 They are wild waves of the sea
Jude1:14 Enoch
Jude1:15 to execute judgment on everyone
Jude1:16 These men are discontented grumblers
Jude1:17 But you
Jude1:18 when they said to you
Jude1:19 These are the ones who cause divisions
Jude1:20 But you
Jude1:21 keep yourselves in the love of God as you await the mercy of our Lord Jesus Christ to bring you eternal life.
Jude1:22 And indeed
Jude1:23 save others by snatching them from the fire; and to still others show mercy tempered with fear
Jude1:24 Now to Him who is able to keep you from stumbling and to present you unblemished in His glorious presence
Jude1:25 to the only God our Savior be glory

Revelation4:2 At once I was in the Spirit

Revelation4:4 Surrounding the throne were twenty-four other thrones
Revelation4:5 From the throne came flashes of lightning
Revelation4:6 And before the throne was something like a sea of glass
Revelation4:7 The first living creature was like a lion

Revelation4:11 “Worthy are You
Revelation5:1 Then I saw a scroll in the right hand of the One seated on the throne. It had writing on both sides and was sealed with seven seals.
Revelation5:2 And I saw a mighty angel proclaiming in a loud voice
Revelation5:3 But no one in heaven or on earth or under the earth was able to open the scroll or look inside it.

Revelation5:5 Then one of the elders said to me

Revelation9:11 They were ruled by a king

Revelation12:1 And a great sign appeared in heaven: a woman clothed in the sun
Revelation12:2 She was pregnant and crying out in the pain and agony of giving birth.
Revelation12:3 Then another sign appeared in heaven: a huge red dragon with seven heads
Revelation12:4 His tail swept a third of the stars from the sky
Revelation12:5 And she gave birth to a son
Revelation12:6 And the woman fled into the wilderness
Revelation12:7 Then a war broke out in heaven: Michael and his angels fought against the dragon
Revelation12:8 But the dragon was not strong enough
Revelation12:9 And the great dragon was hurled down—that ancient serpent called the devil and Satan
Revelation12:10 And I heard a loud voice in heaven saying: “Now have come the salvation and the power and the kingdom of our God
Revelation12:11 They have conquered him by the blood of the Lamb and by the word of their testimony. And they did not love their lives so as to shy away from death.
Revelation12:12 Therefore rejoice
Revelation12:13 And when the dragon saw that he had been thrown to the earth
Revelation12:14 But the woman was given two wings of a great eagle to fly from the presence of the serpent to her place in the wilderness
Revelation12:15 Then from the mouth of the serpent spewed water like a river to overtake the woman and sweep her away in the torrent.
Revelation12:16 But the earth helped the woman and opened its mouth to swallow up the river that had poured from the dragon’s mouth.
Revelation12:17 And the dragon was enraged at the woman
Revelation13:1 Then I saw a beast with ten horns and seven heads rising out of the sea. There were ten royal crowns on its horns and blasphemous names on its heads.
Revelation13:2 The beast I saw was like a leopard
Revelation13:3 One of the heads of the beast appeared to be mortally wounded. But the mortal wound was healed
Revelation13:4 They worshiped the dragon who had given authority to the beast
Revelation13:5 The beast was given a mouth to speak arrogant and blasphemous words
Revelation13:6 And the beast opened its mouth to speak blasphemies against God and to slander His name and His tabernacle—those who dwell in heaven.
Revelation13:7 Then the beast was permitted to wage war against the saints and to conquer them
Revelation13:8 And all who dwell on the earth will worship the beast—all whose names have not been written from the foundation of the world in the Book of Life belonging to the Lamb who was slain.
Revelation13:9 He who has an ear
Revelation13:10 “If anyone is destined for captivity
Revelation13:11 Then I saw another beast rising out of the earth. This beast had two horns like a lamb
Revelation13:12 And this beast exercised all the authority of the first beast and caused the earth and those who dwell in it to worship the first beast
Revelation13:13 And the second beast performed great signs to cause even fire from heaven to come down to earth in the presence of the people.
Revelation13:14 Because of the signs it was given to perform on behalf of the first beast
Revelation13:15 The second beast was permitted to give breath to the image of the first beast
Revelation13:16 And the second beast required all people small and great
Revelation13:17 so that no one could buy or sell unless he had the mark—the name of the beast or the number of its name.
Revelation13:18 Here is a call for wisdom: Let the one who has insight calculate the number of the beast

Revelation14:4 These are the ones who have not been defiled with women
Revelation14:5 And no lie was found in their mouths; they are blameless.

Revelation15:2 And I saw something like a sea of glass mixed with fire
Revelation15:3 and they sang the song of God’s servant Moses and of the Lamb: “Great and wonderful are Your works
Revelation15:4 Who will not fear You

Revelation16:3 And the second angel poured out his bowl into the sea

Revelation16:6 For they have spilled the blood of saints and prophets
Revelation16:7 And I heard the altar reply: “Yes

Revelation16:9 And the people were scorched by intense heat

Revelation17:2 The kings of the earth were immoral with her
Revelation17:3 And the angel carried me away in the Spirit into a wilderness
Revelation17:4 The woman was dressed in purple and scarlet
Revelation17:5 And on her forehead a mysterious name was written: BABYLON THE GREAT
Revelation17:6 I could see that the woman was drunk with the blood of the saints and witnesses for Jesus. And I was utterly amazed at the sight of her.
Revelation17:7 “Why are you so amazed?” said the angel. “I will tell you the mystery of the woman and of the beast that carries her
Revelation17:8 The beast that you saw—it was
Revelation17:9 This calls for a mind with wisdom. The seven heads are seven mountains on which the woman sits.
Revelation17:10 There are also seven kings. Five have fallen
Revelation17:11 The beast that was
Revelation17:12 The ten horns you saw are ten kings who have not yet received a kingdom
Revelation17:13 These kings have one purpose: to yield their power and authority to the beast.
Revelation17:14 They will make war against the Lamb
Revelation17:15 Then the angel said to me
Revelation17:16 And the ten horns and the beast that you saw will hate the prostitute. They will leave her desolate and naked
Revelation17:17 For God has put it into their hearts to carry out His purpose by uniting to give their kingdom to the beast
Revelation17:18 And the woman you saw is the great city that rules over the kings of the earth.”
Revelation18:1 After this I saw another angel descending from heaven with great authority
Revelation18:2 And he cried out in a mighty voice: “Fallen
Revelation18:3 All the nations have drunk the wine of the passion of her immorality. The kings of the earth were immoral with her
Revelation18:4 Then I heard another voice from heaven say: “Come out of her
Revelation18:5 For her sins are piled up to heaven
Revelation18:6 Give back to her as she has done to others; pay her back double for what she has done; mix her a double portion in her own cup.
Revelation18:7 As much as she has glorified herself and lived in luxury
Revelation18:8 Therefore her plagues will come in one day— death and grief and famine— and she will be consumed by fire
Revelation18:9 Then the kings of the earth who committed sexual immorality and lived in luxury with her will weep and wail at the sight of the smoke rising from the fire that consumes her.
Revelation18:10 In fear of her torment
Revelation18:11 And the merchants of the earth will weep and mourn over her
Revelation18:12 cargo of gold
Revelation18:13 of cinnamon
Revelation18:14 And they will say: “The fruit of your soul’s desire has departed from you; all your luxury and splendor have vanished
Revelation18:15 The merchants who sold these things and grew their wealth from her will stand at a distance
Revelation18:16 saying: “Woe
Revelation18:17 For in a single hour such fabulous wealth has been destroyed!” Every shipmaster
Revelation18:18 and cry out at the sight of the smoke rising from the fire that consumes her. “What city was ever like this great city?” they will exclaim.
Revelation18:19 Then they will throw dust on their heads as they weep and mourn and cry out: “Woe

Revelation18:24 And there was found in her the blood of prophets and saints

Revelation19:2 For His judgments are true and just. He has judged the great prostitute who corrupted the earth with her immorality. He has avenged the blood of His servants that was poured out by her hand.”

Revelation19:20 But the beast was captured along with the false prophet

Revelation21:26 And into the city will be brought the glory and honor of the nations.
